pr.title: feat: auto-save form inputs to localStorage
pr.body:
## Summary

Auto-saves all form inputs (idea name, description, audience, problem, notes) to `localStorage` as the user types, with a 300ms debounce. On page load, saved draft data is restored into the form fields. The draft is cleared after a successful analysis submission.

**Changes in `src/app.js`:**
- Added `DRAFT_KEY` constant (`build-or-kill:draft`)
- Added `saveDraft()` — debounced write of form data to localStorage
- Added `restoreDraft()` — reads saved draft and populates form fields on page load
- Added `clearDraft()` — removes the draft after successful analysis
- Wired `saveDraft()` to the form's `input` event (alongside existing `markResultStaleIfNeeded`)
- Called `restoreDraft()` at initialization before `restoreLastResult()`

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Fill in some form fields, close the tab, reopen — fields should be restored
- [ ] Fill in fields, click "Analyze idea" — after getting a result, close and reopen — fields should be empty (draft cleared on success)
- [ ] Verify partial input is saved (e.g., fill only description, reload — only description should be restored)

### Notes

- Uses 300ms debounce to avoid excessive localStorage writes on every keystroke
- Draft is stored as JSON under key `build-or-kill:draft`
- No new dependencies added
- Existing contract checks (`npm run check`) are unaffected

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/4559c9a064d945498f229adfcdd45e6c
Requested by: @SSerg-dev
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
